title: store/channel/created
description:
Fires when a channel is created in the control panel or by API.

```json filename="Example callback object" showLineNumbers
{
  "created_at": 1561482670,
  "store_id": "1025646",
  "producer": "stores/{store_hash}",
  "scope": "store/channel/created",
  "hash": "352e4afc6dd3fc85ea26bfdf3f91852604d57528",
  "data": {
    "type": "channel",
    "id": 173331
  }
}
```

allOf.description: A lightweight description of the event that triggered the webhook. Will vary depending on the event registered.

data.description: A lightweight description of the event that triggered the webhook. Will vary depending on the event registered.
